recommendations.title: They'll Love Me When I'm Dead
recommendations.overview: As his life comes to its end, famous Hollywood director Orson Welles puts it all on the line at the chance for renewed success with the film The Other Side of the Wind.

recommendations.title: Won't You Be My Neighbor?
recommendations.overview: For more than thirty years, and through his television program, Fred Rogers (1928-2003), host, producer, writer and pianist, accompanied by his puppets and his many friends, spoke directly to young children about some of life's most important issues.

recommendations.title: Piece by Piece
recommendations.overview: A unique cinematic experience that invites audiences on a vibrant journey through the life of cultural icon Pharrell Williams. Told through the lens of LEGO® animation, turn up the volume on your imagination and witness the evolution of one of music'

recommendations.title: Best of Enemies
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the legendary series of nationally televised debates in 1968 between two great public intellectuals, the liberal Gore Vidal and the conservative William F. Buckley Jr.  Intended as commentary on the issues of their day, these vitr

recommendations.title: The Greatest Night in Pop
recommendations.overview: On a January night in 1985, music's biggest stars gathered to record "We Are the World." This documentary goes behind the scenes of the historic event.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself - Japan Edition
recommendations.overview: BTS perform their Japan concert at Tokyo Dome and Fukuoka Yahuoku Dome during their Love Yourself World Tour.

recommendations.title: Searching for Sugar Man
recommendations.overview: Two South Africans set out to discover what happened to their unlikely musical hero, the mysterious 1970s rock 'n' roller, Rodriguez.

recommendations.title: Queen: Live at Wembley Stadium
recommendations.overview: One of the world's biggest bands returns to the scene of their Live Aid triumph (one year earlier in 1985) to play all their greatest hits in front of a packed Wembley Stadium.

recommendations.title: Demi Lovato: Simply Complicated
recommendations.overview: A personal and intimate look into Demi Lovato's life as not only a regular 25 year old, but also one of the biggest pop stars in the world.

recommendations.title: Farinelli
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Italian opera singer Farinelli, considered one of the greatest castrato singers of all time.
